allow: Bash(python -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(r'C:\\Users\\jeanc\\Downloads\\prueba.xlsx'\); print\('Sheets:', wb.sheetnames\); ws = wb.active; print\('Dims:', ws.dimensions\); rows = list\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\); print\('Rows:', len\(rows\)\); [print\(r\) for r in rows[:15]]")

PowerShell(python -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(r'C:\\Users\\jeanc\\Downloads\\prueba.xlsx'\); ws = wb.active; print\('Sheets:', wb.sheetnames\); rows = list\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\); print\('Total rows:', len\(rows\)\); [print\(i, r\) for i, r in enumerate\(rows[:20]\)]")
